title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Jindal Steel & Power - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Jindal Steel & Power - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Process Engineer with drive and ambition, Jindal Steel & Power in Hyderabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Jindal Steel & Power:
Jindal Steel & Power is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jindal Steel & Power!
